seoTitle: South Mackay vs South Maclean — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Mackay and South Maclean. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Mackay vs South Maclean: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Mackay and South Maclean.
heading: South Mackay vs South Maclean — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Mackay, Queensland and South Maclean, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Mackay has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to South Maclean (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Mackay or South Maclean safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Mackay has a flood risk score of 55/100, while South Maclean scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Mackay scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. South Maclean scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Mackay or South Maclean?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Mackay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
